GASTROINTESTINAL CANINE


Dog food > Farmina Vet Life Canine

Farmina Vet Life Gastrointestinal is a complete dietetic food for dogs, suggested for the reduction of acute of intestinal absorptive disorders; it is recommend for the compensation for maldigestion and for exocrine pancreatic insufficiency.

****ALL FARMINA VET LIFE PRODUCTS REQUIRE A PRESCRIPTION FROM YOUR PET'S VETERINARIAN. PLEASE EMAIL HAPPYPET@FARMINA.COM A COPY OF YOUR PRESCRIPTION AND ORDER NUMBER WITHIN 48 HOURS TO AUTHORIZE YOUR PURCHASE. ANY VET LIFE ORDERS THAT ARE NOT AUTHORIZED WILL BE CANCELED AND REFUNDED WITHIN 72 HOURS.****

    
AVAILABLE IN SIZES 4.4LB - 26.4LB
INGREDIENTS

rice, sweet potatoes, dehydrated chicken, whole oats, chicken fat, dried whole eggs, dehydrated fish, dried beet pulp, natural flavors, herring oil, hydrolyzed fish, pork fat pea, starch, potassium chloride, inulin, fructooligosaccharide, yeast extract, calcium carbonate, salt, powdered cellulose, vitamin A supplement, vitamin D3 supplement, vitamin E supplement, ascorbic acid, niacin, calcium pantothenate, riboflavin, pyridoxine hydrochloride, thiamine hydrochloride, biotin, folic acid, vitamin B12 supplement, choline chloride, beta-carotene, zinc methionine hydroxy analogue chelate, manganese methionine hydroxy analogue chelate, ferrous glycine, copper methionine hydroxy analogue chelate, selenium yeast, calcium iodate, taurine, L-Carnitine, mixed tocopherols (a preservative).

INGREDIENTS AND NUTRITION
SUPPLEMENTAL INFORMATION

Nutritional additives: Vitamin A 15000IU; Vitamin D3 900IU; Vitamin E 600mg; Vitamin C 150mg; niacin 38mg; pantothenic acid 15mg; Vitamin B2 7.5mg; Vitamin B6 6mg; Vitamin B1 4.5mg; Vitamin H 0.4mg; folic acid 0.45mg; Vitamin B12 0.06mg; choline chloride 1800mg; beta-carotene 1.5mg; zinc chelate of the analogous methionine hydroxylase 970mg; manganese chelate of the analogous methionine hydroxylase 400mg; ferrous chelate of glycine hydrate 185mg; copper chelate of the analogous methionine hydroxylase 12.2mg; selenomethionine 68mg; calcium iodate anhydrous 2.4mg; taurine 1000mg; L-carnitine 250mg. Antioxidants: tocopherol-rich extracts of natural origin 10mg.

GUARANTEED ANALYSIS

Crude Protein (min) 22.00%; Crude Fat (min) 9.50%; Crude Fiber (max) 3.00%; Moisture (max) 9.00%; Ash (max) 7.50%; Calcium (min) 0.80%; Phosphorus (min) 0.50%; Potassium (min) 0.75%; Sodium (min) 0.35%; Magnesium (min) 0.060%; Omega-6 Fatty Acids* (min) 2.30%; Omega-3 Fatty Acids* (min) 0.35%. *Not recognized as an essential nutrient by the AAFCO Dog Food Nutrient Profiles.
Calorie content (calculated): ME 3507 kcal/kg - 14,68 MJ/kg; 333 kcal/cup - 1 cup = 95 g.


ENERGY VALUE

RENAL CANINE


Dog food > Farmina Vet Life Canine

Chronic or temporary renal insufficiency; coadjuvant for the treatment of congestive cardiac insufficiency. Farmina Vet Life Renal is a complete dietetic food for dogs formulated to support the renal function in case of chronic or temporary renal insufficiency.

****ALL FARMINA VET LIFE PRODUCTS REQUIRE A PRESCRIPTION FROM YOUR PET'S VETERINARIAN. PLEASE EMAIL HAPPYPET@FARMINA.COM A COPY OF YOUR PRESCRIPTION AND ORDER NUMBER WITHIN 48 HOURS TO AUTHORIZE YOUR PURCHASE. ANY VET LIFE ORDERS THAT ARE NOT AUTHORIZED WILL BE CANCELED AND REFUNDED WITHIN 72 HOURS.****

    
AVAILABLE IN SIZES 4.4LB - 26.4LB
INGREDIENTS

sweet potatoes, rice, chicken fat, dried whole eggs, calcium carbonate, flaxseed, pork fat, herring oil, hydrolyzed fish, natural flavors, salt, potassium chloride, vitamin A supplement, vitamin D3 supplement, vitamin E supplement, ascorbic acid, niacin, calcium pantothenate, riboflavin, pyridoxine hydrochloride, thiamine hydrochloride,
biotin, folic acid, vitamin B12 supplement, powdered cellulose, choline chloride, beta-carotene, zinc methionine hydroxy analogue chelate, manganese methionine hydroxy analogue chelate, ferrous glycine, copper methionine hydroxy analogue chelate, selenium yeast, calcium iodate, L-Lysine, DL-Methionine, taurine, L-Carnitine, monocalcium phosphate, mixed tocopherols (a preservative).

INGREDIENTS AND NUTRITION
SUPPLEMENTAL INFORMATION

Nutritional additives: Vitamin A 15000IU; Vitamin D3 900IU; Vitamin E 600mg; Vitamin C 150mg; niacin 38mg; pantothenic acid 15mg; Vitamin B2 7.5mg; Vitamin B6 6mg; Vitamin B1 4.5mg; Vitamin H 0.4mg; folic acid 0.45mg; Vitamin B12 0.06mg; choline chloride 1500mg; beta-carotene 1.5mg; zinc chelate of the analogous methionine hydroxylase 970mg; manganese chelate of the analogous methionine hydroxylase 400mg; ferrous chelate of glycine hydrate 185mg; copper chelate of the analogous methionine hydroxylase 4.9mg; selenomethionine 68mg; calcium iodate anhydrous 2.4mg; L-lysine HCI 6000mg; DL-methionine 3000mg; taurine 1000mg; L-carnitine 250mg. Antioxidants: tocopherol-rich extracts of natural origin 10mg.

GUARANTEED ANALYSIS

Crude Protein (min) 12.30%; Crude Fat (min) 14.00%; Crude Fiber (max) 3.10%; Moisture (max) 9.00%; Ash (max) 5.50%; Calcium (min) 0.50%; Phosphorus (min) 0.20%; Potassium (min) 0.60%; Sodium (min) 0.10%; Magnesium (min) 0.060%; Omega-6 Fatty Acids* (min) 2.50%; Omega-3 Fatty Acids* (min) 0.50%. *Not recognized as an essential nutrient by the AAFCO Dog Food Nutrient Profiles.

CALORIC CONTROL CANINE


Dog food > Farmina Vet Life Canine

Reduction of excess body weight, coadjuvant in the treatment of diabetes mellitus. Farmina Vet Life Obesity is a complete dietetic food for adult dogs formulated to reduce excess body weight and to control the supply of glucose (diabetes mellitus).

****ALL FARMINA VET LIFE PRODUCTS REQUIRE A PRESCRIPTION FROM YOUR PET'S VETERINARIAN. PLEASE EMAIL HAPPYPET@FARMINA.COM A COPY OF YOUR PRESCRIPTION AND ORDER NUMBER WITHIN 48 HOURS TO AUTHORIZE YOUR PURCHASE. ANY VET LIFE ORDERS THAT ARE NOT AUTHORIZED WILL BE CANCELED AND REFUNDED WITHIN 72 HOURS.****

    
AVAILABLE IN SIZES 4.4LB - 26.4LB
INGREDIENTS

whole spelt, dried beet pulp, dehydrated chicken, whole barley, whole oats, pea fiber, chicken fat, natural flavors, dehydrated fish, pork fat, flaxseed, hydrolyzed fish, powdered cellulose, herring oil, potassium chloride, salt, calcium carbonate, monocalcium phosphate, vitamin A supplement, vitamin D3 supplement, vitamin E supplement, ascorbic acid, niacin, calcium pantothenate, riboflavin, pyridoxine hydrochloride, thiamine hydrochloride, biotin, folic acid, vitamin B12 supplement, choline chloride, beta-carotene, zinc methionine hydroxy analogue chelate, manganese methionine hydroxy analogue chelate, ferrous glycine, copper methionine hydroxy analogue chelate, selenium yeast, calcium iodate, DL-Methionine, taurine, L-Carnitine, mixed tocopherols (a preservative).

INGREDIENTS AND NUTRITION
SUPPLEMENTAL INFORMATION

Nutritional additives: Vitamin A 10000IU; Vitamin D3 400IU; Vitamin E 600mg; Vitamin C 100mg; niacin 25mg; pantothenic acid 10mg; Vitamin B2 5mg; Vitamin B6 4mg; Vitamin B1 3mg; Vitamin H 0.25mg; folic acid 0.30mg; Vitamin B12 0.04mg; choline chloride 2500mg; beta-carotene 1.5mg; zinc chelate of the analogous methionine hydroxylase 970mg; manganese chelate of the analogous methionine hydroxylase 400mg; ferrous chelate of glycine hydrate 185mg; copper chelate of the analogous methionine hydroxylase 68mg; selenomethionine 68mg; calcium iodate anhydrous 2.4mg; DL-methionine 3000mg; taurine 1000mg; L-carnitine 250mg. Technological additives: microcrystalline cellulose. Antioxidants: tocopherol-rich natural extract 10mg.

GUARANTEED ANALYSIS

Crude Protein (min) 21.00%; Crude Fat (min) 5.50%; Crude Fiber (max) 9.50%; Moisture (max) 9.00%; Ash (max) 8.80%; Calcium (min) 0.90%; Phosphorus (min) 0.70%; Potassium (min) 0.60%; Sodium (min) 0.25%; Magnesium (min) 0.100%; Vitamin E (min) 600IU/kg; Omega-6 Fatty Acids* (min) 1.60%; Omega-3 Fatty Acids* (min) 0.35%; L-Carnitine* (min) 250mg/kg. *Not recognized as an essential nutrient by the AAFCO Dog Food Nutrient Profiles.
Calorie content (calculated): ME 3019 kcal/kg - 12,64 MJ/kg; 272 kcal/cup - 1 cup = 90 g.

HP DERMA CANINE


Dog food > Farmina Vet Life Canine

Farmina Vet Life HP Derma is a complete dietetic food for dogs formulated for the reduction of alimentary intolerance to ingredients and nutrients and for dogs suffering from alimentary allergies and atopies. Used as a diagnostic tool (elimination diet). Especially indicated in subjects refractory to treatment of atopic dermatitis and recurrent diarrheas.

****ALL FARMINA VET LIFE PRODUCTS REQUIRE A PRESCRIPTION FROM YOUR PET'S VETERINARIAN. PLEASE EMAIL HAPPYPET@FARMINA.COM A COPY OF YOUR PRESCRIPTION AND ORDER NUMBER WITHIN 48 HOURS TO AUTHORIZE YOUR PURCHASE. ANY VET LIFE ORDERS THAT ARE NOT AUTHORIZED WILL BE CANCELED AND REFUNDED WITHIN 72 HOURS.****

Technological additives: microcrystalline cellulose. Antioxidants: tocopherol-rich extracts of natural origin 10mg.
